mapper.insert: insert into member_import_detail (log_id, row_index, card_no, name, phone, card_type_name, level_name, valid_date, update_time, import_status, member_id, error_msg, created_at) values (#{logId}, #{rowIndex}, #{cardNo}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{cardTypeName}, #{levelName}, #{validDate}, #{updateTime}, #{importStatus}, #{memberId}, #{errorMsg}, now())
